what_worked_well: Batch story creation from RCA recommendations executed successfully
All 5 recommendations converted to stories with proper traceability
RCA document automatically updated with story links
Epic automatically created to group related stories
Stories follow template v2.5 with complete frontmatter
areas_for_improvement: Custom frontmatter fields (source_rca, source_recommendation) not documented in story template
No automated validation that stories created from RCA match template schema
RCA Resolution Status has limited enum values (OPEN, RESOLVED) - no STORIES_CREATED state documented
patterns_observed: RCA→Story conversion follows predictable workflow: parse → select → create → link
Priority mapping from RCA (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) aligns with story priority field
Effort estimates in RCA (hours) can map to story points (1pt ≈ 4 hours)

recommendations.title: Add RCA Traceability Fields to Story Template v2.6
recommendations.description: Document optional source_rca and source_recommendation fields in story template changelog
recommendations.rationale: Currently using undocumented extension fields - formalizing improves auditability

recommendations.title: Add RCA Resolution Status Enum to RCA Template
recommendations.description: Document valid Resolution Status values: OPEN, STORIES_CREATED, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED, WONT_FIX
recommendations.rationale: RCA-002 used 'STORIES CREATED' but this isn't formally documented as valid state

recommendations.title: Add Bidirectional Link Validation to /create-stories-from-rca
recommendations.description: After story creation, verify: (1) story has source_rca field, (2) RCA has 'Implemented in: STORY-NNN'
recommendations.rationale: Currently no automated check that bidirectional links are complete

recommendations.title: Create /audit-rca-traceability Command
recommendations.description: Audit command to verify all RCAs have stories for their recommendations, and all RCA-sourced stories link back
recommendations.rationale: Proactive detection of orphaned recommendations or broken links

constraint_analysis.source_tree_compliance: PASS - All files in correct locations
